case_title: KANIN ASVAPLUNGPROHM VS. RACHEL TUNGFAH LEE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASVAPLUNGPROHM, KANIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, RACHEL TUNGFAH $2,087.87 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,287.87, BALANCE OF SECURITY DEPOSIT. PLAINTIFF RESPONSIBLE FOR PARTS AND A PORTION OF FLOORS AND WINDOW REPAIRS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $150.00) SERVED JUN-07-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, RACHEL TUNGFAH
REMARK:RETURN MAIL-NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO KANIN ASVAPLUNGPROHM-INSUFFICENT ADDRESS/UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF KANIN ASVAPLUNGPROHM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RACHEL TUNGFAH LEE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASVAPLUNGPROHM, KANIN AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, RACHEL TUNGFAH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,895.78 FILED BY ASVAPLUNGPROHM, KANIN AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, RACHEL TUNGFAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
